english: to guess / to advise, to recommend
notes: Has two main meanings: (1) to guess (akkusativ object) and (2) to advise someone (dativ person + zu + dativ). Irregular verb: raten – riet – geraten.

sentences.german: Kannst du raten, wie alt ich bin?
sentences.english: Can you guess how old I am?

sentences.german: Der Arzt hat mir geraten, mehr Sport zu treiben.
sentences.english: The doctor advised me to exercise more.

sentences.german: Ich rate dir zu mehr Geduld.
sentences.english: I advise you to have more patience.
